{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Snail Shell's former owner, Cadaverine Apostle, liked to extract venom from dead rats, and once eliminated Peter's family with spores. Some Snail have suspected that the owner was near-sighted because a Snail once saw them trying to do the same thing to a computer mouse...
|affct=FAME
|hard=ATK
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=1880
|relic1=Socrates' Poison
|relic2=Scale of Anubis
|relic3=Encyclopedia
|relic4=Soul Stone
|relic5=Hannibal's Cup
}}
|color=purple
|earth=6
|water=6
|fire=7
|wind=7
|form=Zombie
|element=Earth
|realm=Britland
|orangehard=RUSH
}}
